title: cyclosorus dimorphus
intro: Cyclosorus dimorphus, also known as the ladder fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Cyclosorus dimorphus are believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies, such as infusions and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
